title: Add BM logo as faint background image and About/Why Choose Us sections

requirements.text: Add the uploaded BM logo image (download-4.webp) as a large, faint background image positioned below the names section on the TrustedElectricalContractorsPage

quotes: ADD THIS IMAGE IN FAINT : ON BACKGROUND BELOW NAMES - IN BIG SIZE

acceptanceCriteria: The BM logo (download-4.webp) is displayed as a background image
The logo appears faint/translucent to not overpower foreground content
The logo is positioned below the names section
The logo is displayed in a large size

requirements.text: Add an 'About BM ENTERPRISES' section to the TrustedElectricalContractorsPage with the provided company description text explaining that BM ENTERPRISES is a leading electrical contracting company specializing in commercial, industrial, and residential installations with hundreds of completed projects and a team of certified electricians and engineers

quotes: BM ENTERPRISES is a leading electrical contracting company specializing in commercial, industrial, and residential electrical installations

acceptanceCriteria: An 'About BM ENTERPRISES' section is present on the page
The section includes the full company description text provided by the user
The text is properly formatted and readable

requirements.text: Add a 'Why Choose Us' section to the TrustedElectricalContractorsPage with four highlighted features: Safety First (rigorous safety protocols and compliance), Quality Assured (certified professionals with premium materials), On-Time Delivery (efficient project management), and Expert Solutions (innovative electrical solutions tailored to needs)
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Why Choose Us' section is present with four distinct feature cards or highlights
Each feature includes its title and full description text as provided
The features are visually distinct and easy to scan

requirements.text: Add a 'Ready to Start Your Project?' call-to-action section on the TrustedElectricalContractorsPage with the text 'Contact us today for a consultation and discover how we can power your success'

quotes: Contact us today for a consultation and discover how we can power your success

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Ready to Start Your Project?' heading is displayed
The section is visually prominent to encourage user action

constraints: Use the uploaded image file download-4.webp as the background image source
Preserve existing content and layout structure of TrustedElectricalContractorsPage
Maintain consistent styling with existing BM Enterprises design system
nonGoals: Adding interactive functionality beyond what's already present
